schedules.name: IrrigationCycle
schedules._comment: Water delivery - 30min pulse once per 24h (DISABLED - enable when ready, ~6AM daily)

schedules.name: GrowhouseLighting
schedules._comment: Day/night cycle lighting - toggles every hour (DISABLED - requires time-based scheduling)

schedules.name: HeatingControl
schedules._comment: Climate control - temperature-based toggle every 5min (DISABLED - requires DHT sensor feedback)

schedules.name: SystemHeartbeat
schedules._comment: Device alive indicator - LED blinks every 10 seconds (ALWAYS ON for monitoring)

schedules.name: SensorPowerCycle
schedules._comment: Sensor wake-up pulse - 0.5s power pulse every 10min to trigger readings (DISABLED)

schedules.name: MoistureCheck
schedules._comment: ADC soil moisture read - every minute (DISABLED - for monitoring integration)

_metadata.scenario: Multi-crop greenhouse with automated irrigation, climate, and monitoring
_metadata.deployment_context: Remote field deployment with WiFi gateway and MQTT telemetry
safety_notes: All dangerous operations (irrigation pump, heater) are DISABLED by default
Enable only after verifying device connections and sensor calibration
Monitor first run in manual mode before relying on automation
Irrigation scheduled for early morning (86400ms = 24h interval)
